meta.homeTitle: DriveMaster | Driving School Center for A1 A2 B1 B2 Courses
meta.homeDescription: Driving school website with consultation landing page, student area, admin dashboard, online exams, and bilingual SEO-ready content.
meta.loginDescription: Login page for admins and students to manage courses, take exams, and review results.
meta.examDescription: Students can review their course, check exam history, take online theory exams, and open result details.
meta.resultDescription: Students can review pass or fail status, exam history, and detailed answer explanations after submission.
meta.adminDescription: Admin dashboard to manage students, exams, questions, results, and center analytics.

common.footerText: A complete website for driving schools to capture leads, manage students, and run online exams in one workflow.

footer.address: 123 Nguyen Van Linh, District 7, Ho Chi Minh City
footer.supportOne: Student accounts are created by admins after registration is confirmed.
footer.supportTwo: Students can review their course, pass or fail status, and answers after each exam.
footer.supportThree: The dashboard is designed for small and medium-sized businesses that need a simple operating flow.

home.title: Register faster, train with structure, and track every learner clearly
home.subtitle: A complete website for driving schools with course consultation, admin dashboard, student login, online exams, and detailed result tracking after every submission.
home.heroNote: Student accounts are prepared by the center. Learners only need to log in to review their course and exam results.
home.trustOneText: Only admins can create student accounts, assign exams, and manage the full center workflow.
home.trustTwoText: Large buttons, clear layouts, and short flows help even less technical learners use the site comfortably.
home.trustThreeText: All key content is bilingual to support consultation and improve SEO from the beginning.
home.introTitle: An easy system for the center to operate and for students to understand
home.processOneText: The student leaves contact details, the center follows up, and the right course and schedule are confirmed.
home.processTwoText: The admin creates the student account, assigns the course, and shares login details.
home.processThreeText: Students log in, review their course, take online exams, and revisit answers after each submission.
home.processFourText: The admin dashboard updates exam outcomes, registrations, and student progress right away.
home.packagesTitle: Choose the learning path that fits each student
home.packageA1: A compact program for standard motorbike licensing with fast enrollment and flexible scheduling.
home.packageA2: Designed for learners preparing for larger motorbike licenses with a structured practice path.
home.packageB1: An automatic car pathway that combines theory training with guided exam preparation.
home.packageB2: The most popular course with online exams, attempt tracking, and admin reporting.
home.feedbackTitle: What students and staff say about the platform
home.feedbackOne: My B2 registration was fast, and logging into the system to review results was very clear.
home.feedbackTwo: Admins can view leads, students, questions, and exam outcomes from one dashboard, which saves a lot of time.
home.feedbackThree: The mobile experience is smooth, and the bilingual interface helps us support more learners.
home.formTitle: Receive a course path and tuition estimate in five minutes
home.formSupport: The form is responsive, submits through AJAX, stores data for the admin dashboard, and is friendly for first-time visitors.
home.formPointOne: No account is required to request consultation
home.formPointTwo: The admin contacts the learner and creates a student account after confirmation
home.formPointThree: Information is stored right away for center tracking and reporting
home.ctaTitle: Ready to start the driving license journey?
home.ctaText: Receive a suitable study plan, tuition estimate, and exam schedule today.

login.title: System login
login.subtitle: Admins manage the dashboard, while students enter their own course area, take exams, and review results after each submission.
login.hint: If you do not have an account yet, please contact the center for login details.
login.helperOne: Only admins can create student accounts.
login.sideTitle: Built for small and medium-sized businesses
login.sideOne: Admins can review leads, students, exam outcomes, and question banks in one workspace.
login.sideTwo: Students land on one simple page to review their course and take exams.
login.sideThree: Vietnamese and English are both supported for a clearer experience.

student.heroCopy: This is where students can review their course, check whether they passed, and take online exams for practice.
student.nextStepOne: Review the course details and exam name above.
student.nextStepTwo: Take the exam carefully and submit it. The system grades it immediately.
student.nextStepThree: If you do not pass yet, review the answers and take the exam again to practice more.
student.historyCopy: Students can review pass or fail status and reopen each result detail.
student.historyEmpty: You have not taken any exams yet.
student.noAttemptCopy: You have not submitted this exam yet.

exam.title: Online exam room
exam.subtitle: Welcome
exam.empty: There is no active exam available right now.
exam.toastRetakeAvailable: This student can retake the exam. A new attempt will be saved.

result.title: Exam result
result.criticalFail: Failed because of a critical question.
result.historyCopy: Students can track every attempt and see whether they passed.
result.reviewCopy: Review your choice, the correct answer, and the explanation provided by the admin.
result.noExplanation: No explanation is available for this question yet.

admin.title: Admin dashboard
admin.studentsTableCopy: Student accounts created and managed by the admin team.
admin.registrationsTableCopy: Fresh leads from the landing page appear here for follow-up.
admin.examListCopy: Create, edit, and delete exams inside modals, then refresh the dashboard instantly.
admin.recentResultsCopy: Review pass or fail status and critical-question outcomes in one place.
admin.questionListCopy: Filter by exam, critical questions, and keywords to manage the bank faster.
admin.searchQuestionPlaceholder: Type keywords to search question content
admin.heroCopy: Track students, registrations, exam outcomes, and center data from one admin workspace.
admin.overviewCopy: The dashboard refreshes immediately after each save or delete action.
admin.modalStudentCopy: Add a new student and push it straight into the managed list.
admin.modalExamCopy: Once saved, the exam list and dashboard refresh automatically.
admin.modalQuestionCopy: Manage the question bank and critical questions inside a focused popup form.
admin.confirmBody: Are you sure you want to continue with this action?
admin.deleteExamBody: Are you sure you want to delete this exam?
admin.deleteQuestionBody: Are you sure you want to delete this question?
admin.emptyQuestions: No questions match the current filters.
